titleStmt.title: SII 26.151: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 151. (A.R. No. 143 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ Vīrarājēndradēva: No date: c. 1207-52 A.D.

summary.p: It is incomplete and damaged. It refers to the devastation caused to Kaṟaivaḻi-nāḍu during the king's invasion and to the damages done to the temples in a number of places (in the nāḍu). It records the gift made by the king of the village Iraṭṭaiyaṉpāḍi in Vaikāvi-nāḍu as a dēvadāna to a number of temples including the temple of Vīrachōḻīśvaram-uḍaiyār, etc., probably of Koḻumam, the temple of Tirumaruduḍaiyār of Kaḍaṟṟūr, etc., It is stated that this gift excludes the dēvadānas, tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam and maṉṟāḍu already existing in the village and that the existing tenants would continue there and no tenant from another village should be allowed to be a tenant here.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etat viśvamahipālamaulibṛndrairalaṅkṛtam . virarājendradevasya śāsanam śāśvatam bhuvi . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai
koṇṭān Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḻicuramuṭaiyār koyittevakanmikaḷukkum Āḷuṭaiyār kāt koṇṭār koyittevakanmikaḷukkum Āḷuṭaiyār
Atirātirāticcuramuṭaiyār koyittevakanmikaḷukkum Innāyaṉār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattil ḻakiya nācciyār koyit tevakanmikaḷukkum Āḷuṭaiyār
virarācentira Īcuramuṭaiyār koyit tevakanmikaḷukkum muṭaiyār koyittevakanmikaḷukkum Āḷuṭaiyār Irācarāca Īcuramuṭaiyār tevar kanmi
kaḷukkum Āḷuṭai
yār ṭaiyārtevaka
tevinallūr Āla
ramuṭaiyār tevaṟ
rattoḻulil Āḷuṭaiyār
taraṇicuramuṭaiyār tevakanmikaḷukkum kaṭaṟ
ṟūr Āḷuṭaiyār tirumarutuṭaiyār teva
kanmikaḷukkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāva
tu nām paṭaieṟṟi karaivaḻināṭuṅkeṭṭu
mumaḻintu Ivvūrkaḷil tirukkoyili
l tiruvācalaḻivu paṭukaiyālitukku
ppirāyaccittamāka Innāyanmāṟku viṭṭu
kkuṭutta Ūr vaikāvi nāṭṭu Iraṭ
ṭaiyaṉpāṭiyāna ḻalaḻaka
ccaturvetimaṅkalamum Iraṭṭaiyaṉ
pāṭi Āka minnāyanāṟkut tevatānamāka Ip
kuṭuttamaiyil Ivvūṟku perunāṉkellaiyā
vatu kiḻpāṟkellai valampuḻivempukku meṟkunila
tenpāṟkellaikuṉ ḷaikku vaṭakkum melpā
ṟkellaikutaṉi yāṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
llai A rāmalai peruvaḻikku teṟkum Innān
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa Ivvūr tevatānamāka viṭṭa
maiyil Ivvellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey punceyum
menokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkina kiṇaṟum maṟṟum
teṟṟiyum Uṭumpoṭu Āmai tavaḻiyumāna paṭukā
ṭun teṉpaṭuvaraiyu minpaṭucuṉaiyu maṟṟu
meppeṟpaṭṭiṉavaiyu minnāyaṟmāṟku tevatānamā
ka viṭṭamai yivivvūril muṉpuḷḷa paḻantevatānaṅ
tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamum paḻaiya maṉṟāṭṭum nikki
maṟṟeppeṟapaṭṭaṉavaiyum Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāya me
lavai yukavai maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭicuraṟku mavarka
māṟponta muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatu kuṭimaippāṭu ta
kaḷukkuk kuṭuttamai [ IlivūṟiṟRead ivvūṟiṟ •] paḻaiya kuṭikaḷe kuṭi
yāvatākavu maṟṟaiyūr kuṭi Ēṟakkaṭavatallatākavu
ṅ kāliṟ cetta kuṭikku kumpiṭṭu koḷvār
kaḷākavu mivvūṟ kuṭimaka nivvūṟkuḷḷiṭuñ cuṅkam
tavakaḷukkiṭuvatākavum Ivvellaikkuṭpaṭṭiṟai
yālum melavaiyālum maṟṟuṅkuṭimutalāṉavai
nālukūṟṟiliruntu viracoḻicuramuṭaiya
Digital edition of SII 26.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
